description: Comprehensive TrueNAS monitoring — system health, ZFS pools, scrub tasks, snapshots, datasets, disks, CPU, memory, network, services, shares (SMB/NFS/iSCSI), apps/Docker, VMs/Incus, boot environments, security posture (2FA/SSH/KMIP), backup/replication, alerts, events, audit, directory services, and exporter diagnostics. v5 covers 35+ new API endpoints.

panels.description: Correlates memory pressure with ZFS ARC growth and swap usage.
panels.title: Memory and ARC Composition

panels.description: Fast ranking of which pools are consuming the most capacity.
panels.title: Pool Utilization

panels.title: Top Dataset Utilization

panels.description: Aggregate interface throughput for the selected interfaces.
panels.title: Network Throughput

panels.title: Pool Scan Seconds Remaining

panels.title: Pool VDev Read Errors
